note: node_modules was missing at plan write time. Install deps before Playwright layout suites. geometric_analyzer.py currently hardcodes /home/z/my-project paths — override or symlink, or edit GEOMETRY_PATH/OUT_DIR to repo-relative scripts/screenshots/.

dev_server: # server must listen on http://localhost:3000 (or set BASE_URL)

check_section_structure.expects: exit 0; fails CI if S01 V3 tags removed

playwright_v3_state_machine.expects: state machine JSON + ledger + S01 count tests; no browser required for file-based tests

playwright_full_regression.expects: 52 sections registry, browser load, tabs, capstones, demos, geometric no-overlap spotchecks

steps: python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; import scripts.geometric_analyzer as g"  # prefer path fix first
# After fixing GEOMETRY_PATH to repo scripts/screenshots/geometry.json:
forensic_screens_then_geometry.geometry_path_fix_note: Edit scripts/geometric_analyzer.py lines GEOMETRY_PATH and OUT_DIR to Path(__file__).resolve().parents[1] / 'scripts/screenshots/geometry.json' and .../analysis before running on this machine.

how_to_run_summary: 1. npm install && npx playwright install chromium
8. Optional layout forensics: forensic_screens.py then geometric_analyzer.py (fix absolute paths first)
